params.name: Bladden's Head
params.description: This head with a samurai helmet once belonged to Sword God, one of the eight Demon Gods. He was a sword master who never lost any battle except for the one with the snail. His head then became part of the snail's collection.
params.ss1:
Snail HP +200
Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +10
Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
params.ss2:
Snail HP +400
Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +20
Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
params.ss3:
Snail HP +600
Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +30
Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
